description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gcc Docker image. Define a build job in the default test stage that runs `mkdir build`, `cd build`, `cmake ../`, and `make`, and stores all untracked files as an artifact named $CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs `mkdir public` and `mv build/bin public`, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. No caches or services are required.
